---
name: "✨ Feature Request"
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## 💡 Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 🤔 Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## 📋 Proposed Solution

Describe your ideal solution. Include code examples, API sketches, or config snippets if relevant.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've considered (and why they're not ideal).

## 🔗 Related Issues

List any related issues or PRs (e.g. #123).

## 📎 Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or references.
